data.name: MELONS MILKSHAKE: JUICY BATTLEFIELD
data.detailed_description:
MELONS MILKSHAKE: JUICY BATTLEFIELD (all characters are 18+ and no character get hurt in this video game), a sex and blowjob simulation game, in every sex position there is blowjob section you can do with darling before sex or after sex, in this new MELONS MILKSHAKE game there are many new costumes for darling that you can choose

your goal is creampie your thirsty darling, before activating creampie you must make the darling squirt, you can watch the squirt meter during sex, the darling will squirt when the squirt meter is 100%

here are you can do in the game

1. have sex with cute and beautifull darlings

2. you can milk darlings boobs and big tits during have sex

3. get blowjob from darlings

4. you can creampie your darlings

5. 4x camera zoom during sex scene

6. you can costumize your darling outfit before having sex with her, also change darlings outfit is possible during have sex

7. you can change the hairstyle of your darlings, there are 3 hairstyles you can choose

8. you can add hair accessories for your darlings like flower hairpin, butterfly hairpin, cat ears headband, maid headband and many more

9. you can choose what kind of choker for your darlings, there are 4 choker you can choose

10. now you can put on high heels or sexy boots for darling

data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: windows 7 64 bit
  • 處理器: 2.5+ GHz processor
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: windows 10 or 11 64 bit
  • 處理器: 3 GHz processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Vulkan compatible graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
